lines.en: Hello, Tom. How are you feeling today?
lines.zh: 你好，汤姆。你今天感觉怎么样？

lines.en: Much better, Doctor. I do not have a fever anymore.
lines.zh: 好多了，医生。我已经不发烧了。

lines.en: That is good. Are you still coughing?
A little, but not as much as before.
lines.zh: 还有一点，但不像之前那么厉害了。

lines.en: Let me listen to your breathing. Breathe in deeply.
lines.zh: 我听听你的呼吸。深吸一口气。

lines.en: Good. Your lungs sound clear. You are recovering well.
lines.zh: 好的。你的肺部听起来很清晰。恢复得不错。

lines.en: Do I still need to take the medicine?
Take it for two more days, then you can stop.
lines.zh: 再吃两天，然后就可以停了。

lines.en: Thank you, Doctor! I will go back to school tomorrow.
lines.zh: 谢谢医生！我明天就回学校。
